text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf gears herself up for the Satsuki
Sho, but it weighs on her mind that the rest of the
student council had kept the general manager's
doubts a secret from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she steps onto the track, she resolves to aim
for absolute perfection. If she can always be her
best self, nobody will hesitate to rely on her
again.
